mapper.select:
SELECT o.orders_no AS ordersNo, o.orders_date AS ordersDate, o.orders_tot_price AS ordersTotPrice, o.orders_status AS ordersStatus, o.member_id AS memberId,
COUNT(oi.oi_no) AS oiCnt, MIN(p.product_img) AS oiImg, MIN(p.product_name) AS oiProductName
FROM orders o LEFT JOIN Order_Item oi ON oi.orders_no = o.orders_no LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_no = oi.product_no
WHERE o.member_id = #{memberId} and o.ORDERS_DATE >sysdate-(30 * #{range}) GROUP BY o.orders_no, o.orders_date, o.orders_tot_price, o.orders_status, o.member_id
ORDER BY o.orders_date DESC

SELECT oi.oi_no, oi.oi_price, oi.oi_qty, oi.orders_no, oi.product_no, p.product_img AS p_img, p.product_name AS p_name, o.orders_date AS o_date, o.orders_status as o_status FROM order_item oi JOIN product p ON oi.product_no = p.product_no JOIN orders o ON oi.orders_no = o.orders_no WHERE oi.orders_no = #{ordersNo}
mapper.insert: insert into Orders ( orders_no, orders_date, orders_tot_price, orders_status, member_id ) values( #{ordersNo}, #{ordersDate}, #{ordersTotPrice}, #{ordersStatus}, #{memberId} )

insert into order_Item( oi_no, oi_price, oi_qty, product_no, orders_no ) values( order_item_oi_no_SEQ.nextval, (select product_price from product where product_no=#{productNo}), #{oiQty}, #{productNo}, #{ordersNo} )

INSERT INTO Orders ( orders_no, orders_date, orders_tot_price, orders_status, member_id ) VALUES ( #{ordersNo}, #{ordersDate}, (select product_price * #{qty} from product where product_no=#{productNo}), #{ordersStatus}, #{memberId} )
mapper.update: update orders SET orders_status = '취소완료', ORDERS_TOT_PRICE=0 WHERE orders_no = #{ordersNo}
UPDATE order_item SET oi_qty = 0 ,oi_price=0 WHERE oi_no = #{oiNo} AND orders_no = #{ordersNo}
UPDATE order_item SET oi_qty = 0 ,oi_price=0 WHERE orders_no = #{ordersNo}
UPDATE orders SET orders_status= '부분취소', ORDERS_TOT_PRICE=(select sum(OI_PRICE) from order_Item where orders_no=#{ordersNo}) WHERE orders_no = #{ordersNo}
